test-code.description: ArrayList field is a violation - use MutableList
HashMap field is a violation - use MutableMap
HashSet field is a violation - use MutableSet
TreeMap field is a violation - use MutableMap (sorted)
MutableList field is not a violation - already uses interface type
MutableMap field is not a violation - already uses interface type
Local ArrayList variable is not a violation
List interface declared type with ArrayList initializer is not a violation
